word: H6631 - צֶאֱצָא - tseʼĕtsâʼ - tseh-ets-aw' - That which cometh forth

sections.paragraph:
Original: צאצא

Transliteration: tse'ĕtsâ'

Phonetic: tseh-ets-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. offspring, produce, issue
    1. offspring (of men)
    2. produce (of earth)
    3. descendants (metaphorical)

Origin: from H3318

TWOT entry: 893b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
